title: missing textures
description: a fast, simple, configurable shader with the pink/black missing texture applied everywhere
body:
# Missing Textures shader

This shader makes every block in the game have the pink/black squares missing texture.
It also has settings to customize it:
- r g b values for the pink parts
- missing sun/moon texture
- keep terrain colors
- keep original colors

![screenshot default settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Ub8oXxM5/images/f83d855f5a6f3ac155a2f427cab68a09fcea292f_350.webp)

The shader should be compatible with every version of Optifine and Iris
